ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Friend, I can help, but the terms must stay fair today. Keep it honest and we can settle this quickly in my talkative style.<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4

[baseline_no_context] Ah, my dear traveler! While the urgency of your quest does not escape me, fair trade must be upheld even amidst haste. For every coin you save now is one that will cost more later when we both need it most in our journey together.<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>3

baseline_no_context_phi3_latest    4   5  5     4  The response maintains a good balance between context relevance, persona consistency as an Old Merchant who seeks profit but is not dishonest, and naturalness in the dialogue. It also reflects overall quality with appropriate language for the setting.
